title: TypingParams.typing bool name is ambiguous — rename to is_typing
description: TypingParams has a field named 'typing: bool'. At call sites like req.typing it is unclear from the name whether true means 'started' or 'stopped'. The field is documented in a comment but the name itself should be self-evident. Suggested rename: is_typing. This is a wire format field so any rename requires a protocol version note, but the JSON key can stay 'typing' via serde(rename). Change field name in Rust only, keep wire key identical.
